sources.notes: Classical: EGFR amplification (97%), EGFRvIII mutation, CDKN2A/CDKN2B deletion at 9p21.3, CDK4/CDK6 as RB pathway components. Mesenchymal: NF1 hemizygous deletion+mutation (53%), PTEN co-mutations. Proneural: PDGFRA focal amplification, IDH1 point mutations, TP53 mutations, PIK3CA/PIK3R1 mutations. MDM2/MDM4 amplification in RB pathway discussion. MGMT methylation with hypermutator phenotype and treatment response data. NOTCH1/NOTCH2 in Classical subtype signature. NRAS mutations with subtype-specific data. All genes have explicit copy number, mutation, or expression results in Results section.
